Home › FAQs › Db Isolation Demo Mysql

Db Isolation Demo Mysql

Last updated: Apr 16, 2026

Table of Contents

  • 設定隔離級別
  • Session 級別（當前連線）
  • 全域級別（影響所有新連線）
  • 持久化設定（my.cnf）
  • 查看當前隔離級別
  • Java JDBC 設定
  • 隔離級別演示
  • 準備：建立 Accounts 表
  • ✅ Demo 1: Dirty Read (READ UNCOMMITTED)
  • ✅ Demo 2: Prevent Dirty Read (READ COMMITTED)
  • ✅ Demo 3: Non-Repeatable Read (Fixed by REPEATABLE READ)
  • ✅ Demo 4: Phantom Read (Fixed by SERIALIZABLE)
  • 🧠 Summary

MySQL 隔離級別設定與實際演示

設定隔離級別

Session 級別（當前連線）

1SET SESSION TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL REPEATABLE READ;
2START TRANSACTION;
3-- 執行查詢
4COMMIT;

全域級別（影響所有新連線）

1SET GLOBAL TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED;
2-- 需要 SUPER 或 SYSTEM_VARIABLES_ADMIN 權限

持久化設定（my.cnf）

1[mysqld]
2transaction-isolation = READ-COMMITTED

1sudo systemctl restart mysql

查看當前隔離級別

1SELECT @@session.transaction_isolation;  -- Session 級別
2SELECT @@global.transaction_isolation;   -- 全域級別

Java JDBC 設定

1Connection conn = dataSource.getConnection();
2conn.setTransactionIsolation(Connection.TRANSACTION_SERIALIZABLE);
3conn.setAutoCommit(false);
4conn.commit();

隔離級別演示

使用 accounts 表，示範各隔離級別下不同異常的發生與防止。

準備：建立 Accounts 表

1DROP TABLE IF EXISTS accounts;
2CREATE TABLE accounts (
3    id INT PRIMARY KEY,
4    name VARCHAR(50),
5    balance INT
6);
7
8INSERT INTO accounts VALUES (1, 'Alice', 100), (2, 'Bob', 200);

✅ Demo 1: Dirty Read (READ UNCOMMITTED)

Open Session A:

1SET SESSION TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
2START TRANSACTION;
3
4UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - 50 WHERE id = 1;
5-- Don't commit yet

Then, in Session B:

1SET SESSION TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ UNCOMMITTED;
2START TRANSACTION;
3
4SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = 1;
5-- Sees Alice’s balance as 50 (even though it's uncommitted)

🔴 Dirty read occurred. If Session A rolls back, Session B saw incorrect data.

✅ Demo 2: Prevent Dirty Read (READ COMMITTED)

In Session A:

1SET SESSION TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED;
2START TRANSACTION;
3
4UPDATE accounts SET balance = balance - 50 WHERE id = 1;
5-- Don't commit yet

In Session B:

1SET SESSION TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL READ COMMITTED;
2START TRANSACTION;
3
4SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = 1;
5-- Sees balance still 100 (no dirty read)

✅ Safer — only committed data is visible.

✅ Demo 3: Non-Repeatable Read (Fixed by REPEATABLE READ)

In Session A:

1SET SESSION TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL REPEATABLE READ;
2START TRANSACTION;
3
4SELECT balance FROM accounts WHERE id = 2;
5-- returns 200

Then in Session B:

1START TRANSACTION;
2UPDATE accounts SET balance = 250 WHERE id = 2;
3COMMIT;

Back in Session A:

1SELECT balance FROM accounts WHERE id = 2;
2-- Still sees 200 (repeatable read)
3COMMIT;

✅ Prevents non-repeatable reads — same query returns the same result.

✅ Demo 4: Phantom Read (Fixed by SERIALIZABLE)

In Session A:

1SET SESSION TRANSACTION ISOLATION LEVEL SERIALIZABLE;
2START TRANSACTION;
3
4SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE balance > 100;
5-- Returns Bob only

In Session B:

1START TRANSACTION;
2INSERT INTO accounts VALUES (3, 'Charlie', 150);
3-- This will block until Session A commits or rolls back

✅ Prevents phantom reads by locking ranges.

🧠 Summary

Level Prevents Use Case Example
Read Uncommitted None Fast analytics (unsafe)
Read Committed Dirty reads Common web apps (PostgreSQL default)
Repeatable Read Dirty + non-repeatable Inventory, money transfer (MySQL default)
Serializable All anomalies Critical booking, finance ops
